_publications._publicationTitle: Gene signature associated with benign neurofibroma transformation to malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: We also grouped segregated sporadic and NF1-associated MPNST samples from the GSE66743 study, as there were no differentially expressed genes between samples
details: Successfully provided expression data for 30 NF and 8 MPNST samples, with no differentially expressed genes found between sporadic and NF1-associated MPNST samples allowing their grouping
